_comment: Chicken Hawk gateway MCP server registry. Owner-tier sessions get MCP routing through here; public/anonymous chat does NOT route to any MCP server (access-tier canon per ~/foai/chicken-hawk/CLAUDE.md). Pin npm package versions explicitly — never use `latest` in production.

taskade._comment: Taskade Org 'The Future of A.I.' — owner-tier wiki / HRPMO / consultancy-CRM surface. Status: APPROVED_SANDBOX_ONLY until trust gate executes (see foai/integrations/taskade/MCP_SETUP.md).

public_chat._comment: /api/public/chat MUST NOT route to any MCP server. Public callers are anonymous and rate-limited; MCP exposure is owner-tier only.

owner_session._comment: Magic-link authenticated owner session (cookie bound to OWNER_EMAIL) can invoke MCP servers via the gateway. Boomer_Angs can invoke through ACHEEVY only.

_owner_blocking_to_enable: Run the quarantine sandbox observation per MCP_SETUP.md (tcpdump + mitmproxy for 1h)
Mint Taskade_Sync_Service_Token in Taskade Settings → API; paste into openclaw vault (MixedCase)
Pipe env through gateway docker-compose with restricted scope
Append outbound endpoint allowlist to PROOF_BUNDLE.md once observation completes
